subject: Enterprise SSO outage blocking all agents
body: Our enterprise support agents cannot log in through SAML SSO. This is a production outage and our SLA clock is nearly breached. Tenant acme-prod, started 45 minutes ago.

subject: Question about invoice correction
body: Can you explain why our last invoice has a duplicate seat charge? Invoice INV-4421.

subject: Webhook retries are slow
body: Some webhook retries are delayed by 20 minutes. We have request IDs and timestamps from us-east.

subject: Data export request needs review
body: A customer asked us to confirm whether their data export includes deleted records. Please verify compliance handling.

subject: API key rotation without downtime
body: We need best practices for rotating API keys without downtime for production integrations.
